basics.name: Luis Gadiel Mondragón Sanchez
basics.label: Information and Communications Technology Engineer
basics.summary: IT Engineer with a strong track record in problem-solving and practical solution implementation. Skilled in designing and implementing innovative solutions. Passionate about driving innovation and staying up-to-date with industry trends. Seeking opportunities to contribute experience in systems development and problem-solving.

work.name: Rassini Brakes, Michigan, USA
work.summary: - Database administration, software architecture, development and implementation of information systems for Rassini Brakes located in Flint, Michigan, USA. - REST APIs. - React and JavaScript. - OpenEdge 4GL. - ERP QAD data retrieval and managment. - Project management.

work.name: Rassini Frenos SA de CV, Puebla, México
work.summary: - Analysis, development, implementation, and training of software and systems for controlling parts processed in the machining, foundry, painting, and release processes, including downtimes, measurement parameters of parts produced, and release requests. - Digitalization of monetary bonuses according to the effectiveness of production for line operators. - Standardization of inputs, stay at the plant, and outputs of raw material trucks. Also, the creation of reports and tracking dashboards for the mentioned sub-processes. - Debugging, development, and monitoring of financial solutions such as reports, automatic uploads (CIM Interfaces), and browsers with the corresponding managers. - Creation and implementation of submodules for supplier payments in the Rassini Suppliers Portal. - Tickets resolutions of software issues, incidents, and troubleshooting to QAD and Rassini information systems. - React, JavaScript, Node JS, REST API, SQL, OpenEdge 4gl, Progress DataBases, and QAD management.

work.name: Audi México, San José Chiapa, México
work.summary: - Creation and implementation of a web application to manage follow-up request analysis of Audi Q5 vehicles in production processes (Oracle Apex). - Management and administration of Oracle Apex, PL/SQL databases. - Elaboration and automation of spreadsheets at direction level with VBA. - Administration and management of data visualization software such as Tableau and Power BI.
highlights: Implementation of software solutions to optimize production processes and data management

education.institution: Instituto Tecnológico del Altiplano de Tlaxcala
